data.title: Apply New Liberal Arts page audit findings

data.body:
Review pass — fresh context.

Read cold: plan, audit doc, git diff against frac-28-audit-new-liberal-arts tip (5 commits).

Verified:
- src/index.css: four --color-house-education-{light,deep,light-foreground,deep-foreground} declared in @theme inline immediately after the Campus block. Comment block extended FRAC-21,25 -> FRAC-21,25,29 with paired-from-day-one continuity note.
- src/pages/LiberalArtsPage.tsx:8: bg-house-education-deep + text-house-education-deep-foreground; style prop removed; inverted selection chrome migrated to selection:bg-house-education-deep-foreground selection:text-house-education-deep (editorial inversion preserved via tokens).
- src/components/sections/LiberalArts.tsx:9: text-house-education-deep-foreground on the section root className; style prop removed.
- LiberalArts.tsx:11: SectorHeader color="var(--color-house-education-light)" — accent role under inversion. The #C41E20 -> #B52828 chroma shift is the documented standout finding flagged for human eyes-on at PR time.
- LiberalArts.tsx:20,31,59,65: all four PretextParagraph children use text-house-education-deep-foreground/90 (paired foreground; alpha preserved).
- LiberalArts.tsx:13 text-display and :28 text-subtitle normal-case unchanged (EXACT no-ops per audit).
- FractalPattern color="#B52828" at LiberalArtsPage.tsx:9 unchanged (EXCLUDED per audit).

INVERSION RULE honored throughout: body voice goes through *-deep-foreground (paired-foreground; cream by FRAC-42 default), not the saturated *-light accent. The {light} sibling is reserved for accent/display use (SectorHeader letter, eyebrow).

Grep verification post-edits: only #B52828 at LiberalArtsPage.tsx:9 (FractalPattern EXCLUDED) remains. Zero matches for text-white, text-white/, selection:bg-white, color:"#fff", color:"#5C1010", color:"#C41E20", selection:text-[#5C1010], or style={{ backgroundColor:"#5C1010" }}.

Tests: pnpm typecheck clean. pnpm test shows 4 failures — exactly the documented baseline (Footer FRAC-88 italic, Footer Jacquard, Navigation mobile labels, Neighborhood min-h-screen). No regressions.

PRD re-check (FRAC-22): semantic-token migration aligns with house structure goal; mobile-first unaffected (no layout changes); preserves Education house identity per DESIGN.md inversion rule.

Acceptance criteria all met. Commit history is 5 logical commits (lattice catchup + tokens + LiberalArtsPage + text-white sites + SectorHeader prop), which matches the plan's commit strategy.

Outcome: PASS. Human flag at PR time: the SectorHeader chroma shift (#C41E20 -> #B52828) is the documented perceptible change; reviewer eyes-on at 375px recommended. If preferred, the human can carry over the #C41E20 value as a separate house-education-accent palette tweak (out of scope here).
